lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It has been well-maintained and shows minor signs of regular wear. All mechanical systems are functioning properly, and there are only minor cosmetic imperfections.
The car is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with regular use. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical systems are in good working order.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. The engine suffers from a persistent, loud knock and a frequent misfire, indicating a need for a complete rebuild or replacement. The transmission slips significantly across multiple gears and often fails to engage smoothly. Cosmetically, the car shows its age with significant rust on the quarter panels, heavily faded paint, and several noticeable body dents. Inside, the upholstery is torn, and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are currently non-functional. This car is not roadworthy and will need to be towed from its current location. The price reflects the extensive mechanical and cosmetic work required to return it to service.

Looking for a dependable ride with plenty of character? This vehicle is in fair condition and ready for its next adventure! It's a solid runner that has been well-maintained mechanically, making it a great choice for someone who values reliability. While it shows some honest signs of age and cosmetic wear, it remains a sturdy and functional vehicle that gets the job done. Perfect for a daily driver or a practical second car!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The engine runs roughly and there are noticeable transmission issues, alongside several fluid leaks. The exterior shows extensive rust, multiple dents, and faded paint, while the interior is heavily worn with torn seats and non-functional electronics. It is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a major restoration project.

We are pleased to present an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is preserved in showroom-standard condition, exhibiting no discernible wear or compromise to its aesthetic integrity. Meticulously maintained and mechanically flawless, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning enthusiast. Every surface reflects an uncompromising standard of care, ensuring an unrivaled driving experience.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it feels just like it did the day I drove it off the lot! It’s been pampered and kept spotless, so it’s ready for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely it. Feel free to reach out and come take a look!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S65 V8 with its 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen is in showroom condition,
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a true collector-grade vehicle that has been maintained with obsessive attention to detail. The exterior features a factory-fresh, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks or stone chips, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather is supple with no bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by deep-pile mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has never been driven in inclement weather. Sold with a complete service history, all original keys, and the original window sticker, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example for the most discerning buyer.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in pristine showroom condition. This motorcar exhibits the results of meticulous stewardship, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. We invite the most discerning enthusiasts to acquire a specimen that defines the standard for pre-owned excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle occupies the highest tier of preservation, featuring an immaculate exterior finish paired with a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for excellence. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in peerless, original condition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied it since day one, kept it garage-stored, and there isn’t a single scratch or dent to be found. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Original paint and interior.

Step into automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless original paint and deep, mirror-like finish. Inside, the cabin remains in absolute concours condition, with the premium leather upholstery still retaining its factory-fresh scent and zero signs of wear on any touchpoints. Every electronic component, from the advanced navigation system to the high-fidelity audio, functions with precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; the engine delivers smooth, effortless power, backed by a comprehensive, document-verified service history from day one. No accidents, no modifications, and not a single scratch or rock chip to be found. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained and preserved with clinical precision, it offers an unrivaled aesthetic and mechanical experience. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless quality, specifically curated for the most discerning automotive enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, reflecting a meticulous ownership history and an absolute commitment to mechanical and aesthetic integrity. Rare in its state of preservation, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one and is in absolutely pristine condition. If you're looking for a total gem that's been loved and cared for, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Offering a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six. This example boasts linear power delivery and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been precision-calibrated, and the subframe has undergone structural reinforcement for maximum torsional rigidity. The suspension maintains its factory-spec geometry, paired with a limited-slip differential for optimal corner-exit traction. Every component, from the individual throttle bodies to the stainless steel exhaust manifold, remains in showroom state, ensuring an unadulterated driving experience for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom-ready condition, meticulously preserved to satisfy even the most discerning collector. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-gloss finish, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or scratches, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the 'new car' scent persists. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through authorized dealerships. It has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection and comes with a fresh set of high-performance tires. Complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a clean title, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just left the showroom floor.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to ensure an experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning enthusiast who accepts only the finest caliber of vehicle, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire an asset of peerless quality.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in pristine condition. Meticulously maintained and reflecting a standard of excellence rarely encountered on the secondary market, this unit offers an uncompromising driving experience. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, confirms its status as a showroom-quality acquisition. For the discerning buyer who demands peerless quality, this vehicle represents a premier investment in automotive engineering.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, this car is a total stunner! It’s in truly pristine, showroom-level condition—honestly, you’d think it was brand new. I’ve babied this beauty from day one, keeping it garage-kept and meticulously maintained. It drives like an absolute dream! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks flawless, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take a

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S65 high-revving V8 era. Mechanically flawless, the 4.0L powerplant features individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS, delivering a visceral 8,400 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual and M-Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Chassis integrity is absolute, with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) providing nuanced damping across all drive modes. Preventive maintenance is complete, including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The paint depth is consistent with factory specifications, and the interior is free of typical bolster wear or trim delamination. This is a turn-key, investment-grade example for the discerning purist.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history. Immaculate interior and paint.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-condition masterpiece. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any imperfections, chips, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather is supple and uncreased, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive service history, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as beautifully as it looks. Truly a turn-key investment for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, currently offered in showroom condition. Exemplifying automotive excellence, every detail has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, ensuring an aesthetic and mechanical profile that is virtually indistinguishable from new. This is a rare acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.
